scripts.build: node scripts/generate-discovery-files.cjs && node scripts/verify-discovery.cjs && bash prepare-deploy.sh && vite build && node scripts/generate-static-seo-pages.cjs && node scripts/verify-static-seo.cjs
scripts.build:vercel: node scripts/generate-discovery-files.cjs && node scripts/verify-discovery.cjs && bash prepare-deploy.sh && vite build && node scripts/generate-static-seo-pages.cjs && node scripts/verify-static-seo.cjs && node scripts/vercel-build.cjs
scripts.build:netlify: node scripts/generate-discovery-files.cjs && node scripts/verify-discovery.cjs && vite build && node scripts/generate-static-seo-pages.cjs && node scripts/verify-static-seo.cjs
scripts.submit:indexnow: node scripts/generate-discovery-files.cjs && node scripts/verify-discovery.cjs && node scripts/submit-indexnow.cjs
scripts.submit:search-console: node scripts/generate-discovery-files.cjs && node scripts/verify-discovery.cjs && node scripts/submit-google-search-console.cjs
scripts.exposure:postdeploy: npm run verify:live-exposure && npm run inspect:search-console -- --include-aliases && npm run report:search-console -- --days=90 --row-limit=50
